general.name: State Merit
general.description: Open to all candidates on pure merit, irrespective of category. About half of all government and aided seats are filled this way.

general.name: Scheduled Castes
general.description: Reserved for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes notified for the State of Kerala.

general.name: Scheduled Tribes
general.description: Reserved for candidates belonging to Scheduled Tribes notified for the State of Kerala.

general.name: Socially & Educationally Backward Classes
general.description: Total SEBC reservation, split across 9 sub-categories. Candidates must produce a community certificate and a Non-Creamy Layer certificate.

special.notes: Reservation for EWS in the General category as per G.O.(MS) No. 128/2020/HEDN dated 20.03.2020.
For B.Arch, sports proficiency marks (out of 500) are added to the architecture rank index (out of 500), so the maximum index becomes 1000.
For B.Arch, NCC proficiency marks (out of 500) are added to the architecture rank index (out of 500), giving a maximum index of 1000.

pwd.document: Valid UDID card or disability certificate issued by a competent authority

ews.description: Economically Weaker Sections reservation in the General category, applicable as per Government of Kerala G.O.(MS) No. 128/2020/HEDN dated 20.03.2020. Requires income and asset certificate in the prescribed proforma.

sports_ncc_additive.description: For B.Arch only, sports and NCC marks are not a separate quota but add directly to the architecture rank index. Marks (out of 500 each) are added to the architecture rank computed out of 500, so a candidate can score up to 1000 on the index.
